items.title: Iowa State Handles Kansas in Ranked, Big 12 Win, Ends Jayhawks' Winning Streak
items.description: Iowa State overcame a slow start to get a convincing, ranked win over Kansas in a Big 12 conference showdown on Saturday.

items.title: Source: Fiala's season likely over after surgery
items.description: Kings star Kevin Fiala's leg injury suffered in Switzerland's loss to Canada is likely season-ending, an NHL source told ESPN.
